headings: Half-term at Dinas Camp near Harlech. May
pages.text:
Half-term at __Dinas Camp__ near __Harlech__. May
Simon 39, Eve 35, Thomas 9, William 7,
Peter 6 (just) John 21months, Charles 6 weeks-

Lovely campsite in the hills.
Rubber tyre for the boys to swing on.
East wind tent. .
We forgot the can opener.
The boys played ball with Liverpool family,
including man in a wheelchair.
Eve backed into a wall.
Simon carried John in his push chair
all the way up to the castle at __Harlech__ from
the carpark. The van worked beautifully. Hot
showers, comfortable bed.

        We visited the river for swimming,
__Harlech__ castle, sandy beach (including sandy
icecream) and had a picnic at the Roman
steps.

        On walks, Simon carried John on his
[bottom of page cut off] Eve carried Charles in Phyllida's
